name: Lamb and Tomato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cube the lamb into 1-inch pieces.
2. Chop the onions.
3. Cook the cubed lamb in butter and oil until it is lightly browned.
4. Add the chopped onions to the pot and cook until they are soft and golden.
5. Stir in the flour and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
6. Season with salt and pepper, then add marjoram, beef stock, and canned tomatoes with their juice.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil and stir well.
8. Pour the contents into a crockpot.
9. Cover and cook on HIGH for 30 minutes.
10. Reduce the heat to LOW and continue cooking for 6-7 hours.
